title: Breathe Out the Storm
lesson: When big angry feelings come, taking slow deep breaths helps you feel calm again.
prompts: In a bright playroom in the afternoon, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits with a happy, focused expression, stacking colourful building blocks into a tall tower. Medium shot at eye level, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a bright playroom in the afternoon, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits with an angry, frustrated expression, fists clenched, as the colourful block tower tumbles down around them. Scattered blocks on the floor. Medium shot at eye level, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a bright playroom in the afternoon, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits in the mid-ground, arms crossed tightly and shoulders tense, with an upset expression. In the foreground, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels close, one hand on their own belly, calmly showing how to take a deep breath. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a bright playroom in the afternoon, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits with eyes gently closed and one hand on their chest taking a slow deep breath, the angry frown softening. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} breathes along encouragingly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a bright playroom in the afternoon, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits with both hands resting loosely in their lap, with a calm, relieved little smile, shoulders relaxed, the storm of feelings passed. Medium shot at eye level, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a bright playroom in the afternoon, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits calmly rebuilding the block tower, with a peaceful, happy smile. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} helps place a block, smiling proudly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: In a bright afternoon playroom, the child sits alone happily stacking colourful blocks into a tall tower, focused.
In the playroom, the child sits alone, angry and frustrated with fists clenched, as the block tower tumbles down around them.
In the playroom, the child sits with arms crossed tightly, upset, while the father kneels close with a hand on his own belly, showing how to take a deep breath.
In the playroom, the child sits with eyes gently closed and a hand on their chest taking a slow deep breath, the angry frown softening, while the father breathes along.
In the playroom, the child sits alone with hands resting loosely in their lap, a calm relieved little smile and relaxed shoulders — the angry storm has passed.
In the playroom, the child calmly rebuilds the block tower with a peaceful smile while the father helps place a block, proud — deep breaths chased the storm away.
texts: In the playroom, {NAME} stacked the blocks into a tall, wobbly tower. "Higher and higher!" said {NAME}, reaching up.
Then it all tumbled down. {NAME} felt SO angry, with two fists clenched tight. "Grrr!" cried {NAME}.
Dad knelt down close to {NAME}. "Let's take a deep breath together," he said, his hand on his belly. "In, and out."
{NAME} closed both eyes and breathed in slow... and out. "In... and out," said {NAME}. The angry storm began to fade away.
Soon {NAME} felt calm again, shoulders soft and a little smile peeking out. "I feel better now," said {NAME}.
Feeling better, {NAME} built the tower again — this time with Dad. "Deep breaths chase the storm away," said {NAME}.
